description: Arranges children vertically or horizontally with optional data-driven spacing.

spacing.description: WPF Thickness applied as an outer Margin to each child. For a horizontal trailing gap of N, use 0,0,N,0; a scalar N applies N on every side, so adjacent children consume 2N.
spacing.previewWarning: Structural preview controls can measure differently from the real package. Check final app clipping and horizontal fit when this margin is non-zero.

children.description: Ordered child elements rendered inside the StackPanel.

adjacencyAdvisory.message: Adjacent horizontal text runs have no effective separation and may render as one concatenated label.
adjacencyAdvisory.repairSuggestion: Set positive stack spacing or add trailing/leading text margin; keep zero separation only when concatenation is intentional.
